body.thing: eval_slice blocks reads past the use-budget on a strict held-out slice
body.intention: A strict eval slice consulted beyond its use-budget raises BudgetExceeded and records nothing — held-out asymmetry cannot be spent silently

red_run.summary:
tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-akien/pytest-401/test_read_past_budget_blocks_s0')

    def test_read_past_budget_blocks_strict_slice(tmp_path):
        """THE proof node: a strict slice raises past budget and records nothing over the line."""
        root = tmp_path / "eval"
        s = EvalSlice("held-out", budget=2, strict=True, root=root)
        s.seal(_entries())
        s.read(by="cc.0", reason="first")
        s.read(by="cc.0", reason="second")
        assert s.reads_used() == 2
